source_notes: Free chart rows use the parsed local Mac free chart feed; Apple returned 98 rows for the requested top 100.
Paid overall and paid Productivity chart rows use Val's local Mac App Store screenshots and the existing OCR-assisted transcription.
Paid overall prices are the visible screenshot prices; Open/Open-Purchased means the account already had that app so the storefront price was hidden.
Paid Productivity prices are filled from overlapping paid-overall rows and local screenshot price checks; Open/View means the storefront hid the price behind the account state.
Mapped categories describe the job-to-be-done, not only Apple's storefront category.

ai_chat_or_writing.reason: General writing and chat overlap with agents; app-specific accounts, communities, and integrations may not.

archive_tools.reason: Archive listing, extraction, and batch validation are deterministic file workflows.

backup_sync_storage_service.reason: Backup verification and inventory fit skills; sync engines and cloud clients remain services.

browser_extension_or_web_wrapper.reason: Agents can replace wrapper workflows, shortcuts, and reports; live browser extensions still need an app or extension.

clipboard_automation.reason: Audits and simple transforms fit scripts; live clipboard history needs a resident utility.

creative_pro_editor.reason: Agents can automate prep/export/metadata, but not replace the real-time canvas or timeline.

data_visualization_or_analysis.reason: One-off analysis and generated charts fit skills; resident UI remains optional.

developer_tools.reason: Code generation, audits, and repo maintenance fit agents; IDE/runtime/distribution surfaces remain.

diagram_mindmap.reason: Agents can generate diagrams and plans; manual canvas editing remains app value.

education_exam_service.reason: Exam delivery, identity, and course/service content are not local replacement targets.

email_calendar_meetings.reason: Search, triage, drafting, exports, and meeting notes fit connectors; the live client/service remains.

file_manager_transfer.reason: Inventory and batch file operations fit skills; device/network transfer clients may still be needed.

genealogy_reference.reason: Import/export/report generation can be agentic; domain database UI remains app-specific.

hardware_device.reason: Drivers, peripherals, and device-specific control need native integrations.

image_media_batch.reason: Batch conversion, metadata, contact sheets, and audits fit skills; interactive editing remains app work.

messaging_social.reason: Network effects, accounts, push notifications, and encrypted client UX are the product.

music_audio_pro.reason: Metadata, conversion, and filing fit skills; instruments, notation, and DAW workflows stay as apps.

network_security.reason: VPN/proxy/MFA/network clients depend on live networking, trust, and OS integration.

notes_tasks_writing_app.reason: Agents can draft, summarize, migrate, and clean content; persistent UI state remains the app value.

office_documents.reason: Creation, conversion, review, and cleanup fit agent workflows; full interactive office UI does not.

password_identity_security.reason: Secrets, MFA, encryption, and autofill have a stricter trust model than a coding-agent skill.

pdf_document_tools.reason: Batch inspection, split/merge/OCR/reporting can be skills; rich visual editing/signing remains app work.

presentation_screen_tools.reason: Deck/content generation fits skills; live annotation, remotes, and screen overlays need resident tools.

remote_desktop_virtualization.reason: VMs and remote desktop need live native clients and OS/network integration.

screenshot_ocr_capture.reason: Organization, extraction, and reports fit skills; hotkey capture/annotation UX usually remains resident.

shopping_service.reason: Retail/account/extension service, not a local deterministic workflow.

storage_audit.reason: Core job is local disk inspection and reporting; deletion remains approval-gated.

streaming_content.reason: Licensed content, playback rights, and streaming UX are service-bound.

system_utility.reason: Inspection and config reporting fit skills; resident menu-bar, input, and always-on behavior usually remains an app.

timer_focus_utility.reason: Reports and simple timers can be scripted; always-on focus/reminder UX remains an app.

transcription_audio_notes.reason: Transcription and summaries fit agents; live recorder UX and permissions remain app-specific.

unknown_or_low_signal.reason: Parsed chart row lacks enough product signal for a defensible replacement call.

video_media_batch.reason: Transcode, trim, metadata, captions, and reports fit ffmpeg-style skills; timeline editing does not.

web_download_archive.reason: Download/export workflows can be automated; browser/session behavior still matters.

window_workspace_management.reason: Value is real-time resident window control, not an offline agent workflow.
